name: auth_login_malformed_array_body
_note: Top-level JSON array. Node's strict body-parser ACCEPTS objects/arrays, so this passes the parser and fails later validation -> 400 invalid-input WITH a real request_id, matching Go. Full-body fixture asserts status + code=invalid-input; request_id present+non-empty on both; error message ignored (Node leaks a volatile validator string). The one malformed-shape body whose envelope is byte-comparable. See #33.
